title: Grilled Fish with Portuguese Flair
description: A refreshing seafood dish with a grilled fish fillet, marinated in a briny Portuguese-inspired sauce and served with a side of grilled vegetables.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together red wine vinegar, olive oil, lemon zest, garlic, and parsley.
Season the fish fillet with salt and pepper.
Brush the fish with the marinade and let it sit for 10 minutes.
Grill the fish for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Let the fish rest for 2 minutes before serving.
Serve with a side of grilled vegetables, such as asparagus or bell peppers.
